events.title: The Wizard of Oz - Spring Musical (Evening Performance)
events.location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
events.description: Woodside High School Drama Department presents 'The Wizard of Oz' Spring Musical production. Evening performance. Doors open 30 minutes before showtime. Concessions available at intermission. Over 50 talented students performing. Tickets: Adults $15, Students/Seniors $10, Children under 5 Free. Purchase online at woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door (cash/card accepted).
